# Echodesk Ecommerce Store
# This file provides information for AI assistants and crawlers

> This is an online ecommerce store powered by Echodesk.
> Products, categories, and pricing are available on the public pages.

## Allowed Pages
- / (Homepage with featured products and collections)
- /products (Product catalog with filtering and search)
- /products/{slug} (Individual product details with pricing, images, reviews)
- /faq (Frequently asked questions)
- /terms (Terms of service)
- /privacy (Privacy policy)
- /shipping (Shipping information)
- /returns (Returns and refunds policy)
- /categories (Product categories)

## Not Indexed
- /account (Private user account)
- /cart (Shopping cart)
- /checkout (Checkout flow)
- /login (Authentication)
- /register (Registration)
